Functions
Hardware Encoder Module Extension Functions

Functions

mw_venc_handle_t mw_venc_create_ex (mw_venc_platform_t platform, mw_venc_inframe_mode_t inframe_mode, mw_venc_param_ex_t *p_param, MW_ENCODER_CALLBACK frame_callback, void *user_ptr)
 Creates extended encoders which support to input OpenGL texture. More...
 
mw_venc_status_t mw_venc_put_opengl_texture (mw_venc_handle_t handle, uint32_t texture[])
 Imports OpenGL texture into encoders. More...
 
mw_venc_status_t mw_venc_destory_ex (mw_venc_handle_t handle)
 Destroys the extended encoders. More...
 

Detailed Description

Function Documentation

mw_venc_handle_t mw_venc_create_ex ( mw_venc_platform_t  platform,
mw_venc_inframe_mode_t  inframe_mode,
mw_venc_param_ex_t *  p_param,
MW_ENCODER_CALLBACK  frame_callback,
void *  user_ptr 
)

#include <mw_venc_ex.h>

Creates extended encoders which support to input OpenGL texture.

Parameters
[in]platformHardware coding platform
[in]inframe_modeInput type of coding data
[in]p_paramExtended parameters of encoder
[in]frame_callbackCallback function
[in]user_ptrCallback parameters
Returns
Returns encoder handle if succeeded, otherwise, returns NULL.

Usage:
The recommended way to call the function is as follows.

1 ....
2 // Encodes callback functions
3 void encode_callback(
4  void * user_ptr,
5  const uint8_t * p_frame,
6  uint32_t frame_len,
7  mw_venc_frame_info_t *p_frame_info)
8 {
9  // Processes data
10 }
11 ....
12 mw_venc_handle_t t_handle = NULL;
13 mw_venc_platform_t t_platfrom = MW_VENC_PLATFORM_UNKNOWN;
14 mw_venc_param_ex_t t_venc_param;
15 mw_venc_status_t t_venc_stat = MW_VENC_STATUS_SUCCESS;
16 mw_venc_get_default_param(&t_venc_param.m_venc_param);
17 mw_venc_inframe_mode_t t_mode = MW_VENC_INFRAME_MODE_OPENGL_TEXTURE;
18 uint32 t_u32_platfrom = mw_venc_get_support_platfrom();
19 if(t_u32_platfrom & MW_VENC_PLATFORM_AMD){
20  //For AMD
21  t_platfrom = MW_VENC_PLATFORM_AMD;
22 }
23 if(t_u32_platform & MW_VENC_PLATFORM_INTEL){
24  //For Intel
25  t_platfrom = MW_VENC_PLATFORM_INTEL;
26 }
27 if(t_u32_platform & MW_VENC_PLATFORM_NVIDIA){
28  //For Nvidia
29  t_platfrom = MW_VENC_PLATFORM_NVIDIA;
30 }
31 t_venc_param.m_venc_param.code_type = MW_VENC_CODE_TYPE_H264;
32 t_venc_param.m_venc_param.fourcc = MW_VENC_FOURCC_NV12;
33 t_venc_param.m_venc_param.targetusage = MW_VENC_TARGETUSAGE_BALANCED;
34 t_venc_param.m_venc_param.rate_control.mode = MW_VENC_RATECONTROL_CBR;
35 t_venc_param.m_venc_param.rate_control.target_bitrate = 4096;
36 t_venc_param.m_venc_param.width = 1920;
37 t_venc_param.m_venc_param.height = 1080;
38 t_venc_param.m_venc_param.profile = MW_VENC_PROFILE_H264_MAIN;
39 ...
40 // Sets AMD OpenGL parameters including HDC g_hdc, HGLRC g_hrc, HWND g_window.
41 if(t_platfrom == MW_VENC_PLATFORM_AMD){
42  t_venc_param.m_amd_opengl_reserved.m_p_opengl_context = g_hrc;
43  t_venc_param.m_amd_opengl_reserved.m_p_window = g_window;
44  t_venc_param.m_amd_opengl_reserved.m_p_dc = g_hdc;
45 }
46 ...
47 // Creates encoders
48 t_handle = mw_venc_create_ex(
49  t_platfrom,
50  t_mode,
51  &t_venc_param,
52  encode_callback,
53  NULL);
54 ...
55 // Inputs data GLuint t_glui_texture[];
56 t_venc_stat = mw_venc_put_opengl_texture(t_handle, t_glui_texture);
57 ...
58 // Gets encoder parameters
59 mw_venc_property_t t_property = MW_VENC_PROPERTY_FPS;
60 mw_venc_fps_t t_fps;
61 t_venc_stat = mw_venc_get_property(t_handle,t_property,&t_fps);
62 ...
63 // Modifies encoder parameters
64 t_fps.num = 30;
65 t_fps.den = 1;
66 t_venc_stat = mw_venc_get_property(t_handle,t_property,&t_fps);
67 ...
68 // Destroys encoders
69 t_venc_stat = mw_venc_destory_ex(t_handle);
70 t_handle = NULL;
71 ...
mw_venc_status_t mw_venc_destory_ex ( mw_venc_handle_t  handle)

#include <mw_venc_ex.h>

Destroys the extended encoders.

Parameters
[in]handleEncoder handle
Returns
The possible return values of mw_venc_status_t are as follows.
MW_VENC_STATUS_SUCCESS Function call succeeded.
MW_VENC_STATUS_INVALID_PARAM Input invalid value(s).

Usage:
The usage refers to mw_venc_create_ex

mw_venc_status_t mw_venc_put_opengl_texture ( mw_venc_handle_t  handle,
uint32_t  texture[] 
)

#include <mw_venc_ex.h>

Imports OpenGL texture into encoders.

Parameters
[in]handleEncoder handle
[in]textureIndex of OpenGL texture
Returns
The possible return values of mw_venc_status_t are as follows.
MW_VENC_STATUS_SUCCESS Function call succeeded.
MW_VENC_STATUS_INVALID_PARAM Input invalid value(s).
MW_VENC_STATUS_UNKNOWN_ERROR Function call failed caused by unknown reasons.
MW_VENC_STATUS_FAIL Function call failed.

Usage:
The usage refers to mw_venc_create_ex
